title: Portfolio Website
description: A fully responsive personal portfolio built with React and Tailwind CSS, featuring smooth animations, a particle background, and lazy-loaded sections.

title: Task Management App
description: A full-stack productivity app with real-time updates, drag-and-drop boards, user authentication, and deadline reminders.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A scalable e-commerce solution with product filtering, cart management, payment gateway integration, and an admin dashboard.

title: AI Quiz Platform
description: An intelligent quiz app with timed challenges, leaderboards, streak tracking, and AI-powered question generation.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: A beautiful weather app with 7-day forecasts, location-based detection, animated weather icons, and air quality indices.
